# AROM STUDIO — Complete Agency Context & Documentation

AROM STUDIO is an independent web design and development agency founded by Arnav Pagare.
We specialize in creating fast, scalable, modern, SEO-friendly, and accessible websites.

## Services Offered
- Business Website Development
- Landing Page Design & Optimization
- E-Commerce Web Stores
- SaaS Application Engineering
- Custom Web Application Development
- UI/UX Design & Prototyping
- Website Redesign & Migration
- Technical SEO & Performance Tuning
- Continuous Website Maintenance

## Technical Stack
- React 19, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- GSAP & Framer Motion Animations
- Vercel Serverless Architecture, Node.js
- Firebase & Supabase Integration

## Contact Information
- Email: aromstudio27@gmail.com
- Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India
- Official URL: https://aromstudio.vercel.app
